description: Phase DF.7 — curated archetype gallery surfaced in the AIHarness user-references pre-generation pane. Each entry references an archetype registered in index.json. When the user picks a gallery entry, HarnessUserReferenceStore records a HarnessUserReference{kind=.gallery, archetypeID=<entry.archetypeId>, caption=<user's note>}. On next generation, the user-references context layer injects the caption; the layout-reference layer (separate, keyword-driven) also fires and injects the DOM+CSS snippets. Two paths, one archetype. Thumbnails are relative paths — render-side resolves them (SwiftUI AsyncImage) against the app's bundled layout-references snapshot, falling back to a generic SF Symbol when the thumbnail is missing.

thumbnails.caption: Hero + narrative + final CTA. Best for SaaS marketing pages.
Orientation / action / status. Best for habit trackers, writing tools, timers.
Center play surface + four seats + info panel. Poker, Hearts, Spades, Bridge, Euchre.

_followups.thumbnails_dir: Thumbnails live under assets/layout-references/thumbnails/. Until those PNGs are captured, the UI renders a placeholder from the archetype's primary color token.
